nasb.text: Many will stumble over them, Then they will fall and be broken; They will even be snared and caught.”

esv.text: And many shall stumble on it. They shall fall and be broken; they shall be snared and taken.”

cnv.text: 許多人必在其上絆跌、仆倒、跌碎， 並且陷入網羅被捉住。”

ccb.text: 许多人必被绊倒，摔得粉身碎骨；他们必被网罗缠住、捕获。”

csbs.text: 许多人将在石头上绊跌、 仆倒、破碎， 陷入圈套被缠住。”
